finding: The Cloudflare Pages project-identity contract is now enforced by a dedicated GitHub Actions workflow on relevant pull requests, pushes to main, and manual dispatches.
acceptance_contract: wrangler and deployment workflow resolve to one canonical project identity
generated identity evidence artifact is retained for 30 days
source-level identity is not represented as deployment proof
privacy_boundary: No credentials, secret values, health information, private chat, or personal identifiers are included.
limits: No workflow run result was available at record creation time.
This does not prove Cloudflare project existence, account authorization, deployment success, DNS resolution, served identity, or scientific truth.
C-001 remains blocked on Cloudflare GitHub environment credentials and an actual deployment run.
falsification_route: Change the Wrangler project name or one deployment-workflow project reference and confirm the CI workflow fails before deployment evidence can be trusted.
